items: Native Claude Code plugin for deterministic memory operations (merge, dedup, validation)
CLI entrypoint at scripts/amnesia.py delegates to modules: schema, entity, project, merge, paths, lang
Commands in commands/*.md are thin orchestrators with no embedded logic
All CLI output is structured JSON: {data, error} — never plain text
Save flow requires two steps: entity diff (preview) then entity save (write)
41 tests covering: schema, paths, entity CRUD, merge/dedup, project sessions, CLI, lang detection, integration roundtrip
Merge/dedup rules: permanent_facts.items and technical_notes dedup by strip+lowercase; decisions dedup by (date, author, decision[:50]); current_status and last_session replaced entirely

decisions.author: user
decisions.decision: Follow Superpowers plugin schema for plugin.json and marketplace.json

decisions.author: user
decisions.decision: Create public GitHub repo at nandomoreirame/amnesia-claude-code

decisions.author: user
decisions.decision: AGENTS.md is a symlink to CLAUDE.md, not a separate file

decisions.author: user
decisions.decision: Use batched execution strategy (6 batches) with rpi-implementer subagents for large plan implementation

decisions.author: user
decisions.decision: Keep scripts/__init__.py — required for Python package imports between modules

last_session.summary: Implemented full plan (18 tasks, 6 batches) via RPI Implement — 41 tests passing, 6 commits on develop branch

technical_notes: marketplace.json source field must be "./" (not ".") for local plugins
owner and author fields in plugin schema must be objects {name, email}, not strings
plugin.json does not support main, commands, or requires fields
File =2.0 in project root was an artifact from unquoted pip install pydantic>=2.0 — removed
pyproject.toml sets pythonpath=["."] so scripts/ is importable as a package with __init__.py
